On January 12, 2026, Apple and Google announced a multi-year partnership. Under this deal, Apple’s next-generation Foundation Models—the core of its AI features—will be built using Google’s Gemini models and cloud technology. The collaboration is expected to power future AI improvements, including a more capable and personalized version of Siri, likely to launch later in 2026 with a spring iOS update. Apple already works with OpenAI to integrate ChatGPT into Siri for advanced queries, and that agreement will remain in place. Apple said it reviewed several options before choosing Google’s technology as the foundation for its next-gen Siri and future AI features. Financial terms were not disclosed, though reports suggest Apple could pay around $1 billion per year for access to Google’s AI. Apple had delayed its AI-powered Siri launch until 2026 due to development challenges, making this partnership a major step forward in bringing advanced AI to its users.","score":0.85995835,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://introl.com/blog/apple-google-gemini-partnership-siri-ai-infrastructure-2026","title":"Apple-Google Gemini Partnership | Introl Blog","content":"# Apple-Google Gemini Partnership: What a $1B AI Deal Means for Infrastructure. Apple licenses Google's 1.2 trillion parameter Gemini model to power Siri. The deal accelerates Private Cloud Compute expansion while Apple builds its own AI server chips. Apple will pay Google approximately $1 billion annually to license a custom 1.2 trillion parameter Gemini model—eight times larger than Apple's current cloud-based models—to power the next generation of Siri and Apple Intelligence features.1 The January 12, 2026 announcement marks the most significant shift in foundation model strategy since Apple launched Apple Intelligence in 2025. The custom 1.2T parameter model will run on Apple's Private Cloud Compute infrastructure, not Google Cloud, preserving Apple's privacy guarantees.2 Apple plans to mass-produce its own AI server chips (codenamed \"Baltra\") in H2 2026, with dedicated data centers coming online in 2027.3 The partnership serves as a bridge while Apple builds internal capability, but infrastructure expansion accelerates immediately to support 2+ billion active devices.4.","score":0.7825466,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://baike.baidu.com/en/item/Apple%20Foundation%20Models/1884749","title":"Apple Foundation Models（Apple Inc. unveiled its AI foundation model series at the 2026 Apple Worldwide Developers Conference.）_Baiduwiki","content":"Apple Foundation Models (AFM) is a new generation AI foundation model series unveiled by Apple Inc. at its conference.
